description: The eyes of your understanding being enlightened;
that ye may know what is the hope of his calling,
and what the riches of the glory of his inheritance in the saints,
promises.title: TEOYUBE; TYMAKWITHOHIS, CAWTROTGLOHINITS

description: beseech you also that ye receive not the grace of God in vain.
promises.title: WETAWTWHIBYATYRNTGOGODIV

description: I have heard thee in a time accepted,
and in the day of salvation have I succored thee: behold,
now is the day of salvation.
promises.title: FOHSIHAHTIATAAITDOSHISTBNITDOS
